introSection: Riddler's Revenge is a steel stand-up roller coaster located at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA. Opened in 1998, Riddler's Revenge set stand-up coaster records for height, drop, speed, length, and the most inversions on a stand-up coaster. All five of these records surpassed those of Chang, which opened at Kentucky Kingdom the year before.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Riddler's Revenge is the second stand-up roller coaster to operate at Six Flags Magic Mountain. The first was Shockwave, which operated from 1986 to 1988.

Construction of Riddler's Revenge began in 1997. The ride officially opened to the public on April 4, 1998. The opening of the ride was part of a redevelopment of the Monterey Landing themed area into the 4.9-acre Movie Town themed area. As part of the expansion, the park added new restaurants, retail outlets, and rethemed some existing rides.

In 2017, Riddler's Revenge was repainted to coincide with the opening of Justice League: Battle for Metropolis and the new Metropolis themed area. The track remained green, however, the supports were changed from black to yellow.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Riddler's Revenge is well known for its interaction with the queue line, making it photogenic from numerous areas. It is currently the only stand-up coaster to have a lift hill that passes through a vertical loop. With six inversions, it holds the record for most on a stand-up coaster.

The music played in the loading station is "Ecuador (Bruce Wayne Mix)" by Sash. (Bruce Wayne is the name of the alter ego of Batman, who the Riddler is a rogue of.)

fullText:
Riddler's Revenge is a steel stand-up roller coaster located at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA. Opened in 1998, Riddler's Revenge set stand-up coaster records for height, drop, speed, length, and the most inversions on a stand-up coaster. All five of these records surpassed those of Chang, which opened at Kentucky Kingdom the year before.

Riddler's Revenge is the second stand-up roller coaster to operate at Six Flags Magic Mountain. The first was Shockwave, which operated from 1986 to 1988.

Construction of Riddler's Revenge began in 1997. The ride officially opened to the public on April 4, 1998. The opening of the ride was part of a redevelopment of the Monterey Landing themed area into the 4.9-acre Movie Town themed area. As part of the expansion, the park added new restaurants, retail outlets, and rethemed some existing rides.

In 2017, Riddler's Revenge was repainted to coincide with the opening of Justice League: Battle for Metropolis and the new Metropolis themed area. The track remained green, however, the supports were changed from black to yellow.

Riddler's Revenge is well known for its interaction with the queue line, making it photogenic from numerous areas. It is currently the only stand-up coaster to have a lift hill that passes through a vertical loop. With six inversions, it holds the record for most on a stand-up coaster.

The music played in the loading station is "Ecuador (Bruce Wayne Mix)" by Sash. (Bruce Wayne is the name of the alter ego of Batman, who the Riddler is a rogue of.)
